step_rationale: AMI progression marker; decreased in multivessel CAD; systemic risk association.
mechanism: Vitamin D-binding protein is an acute-phase reactant and immunomodulatory molecule whose decreased levels in acute MI correlate with disease severity and multivessel involvement.

references.title: Characterization of differentially expressed plasma proteins in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
Correlation between vitamin D binding protein expression and angiographic-proven coronary artery disease.
Proteomics reveals high levels of vitamin D binding protein in myocardial infarction.
